name: research-to-publication
description: Evidence-bound workflow from local PDFs and NotebookLM synthesis to academic paper, public blog, and verified publication.

interface.shortDescription: 從研究資料到論文、科普文章與發布
interface.longDescription: 匯入本地 PDF 與 NotebookLM 跨文獻分析，經兩階段證據稽核與整合，產出 academic paper、繁體中文 blog 並在核准後發布。
interface.defaultPrompt: Use $research-to-publication to turn this local research corpus into an evidence-bound academic paper and public blog.
